subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath made manifest the Path unto them that seek the truth, and revealed the signs of His narrow way unto those who search with scrutiny and investigation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اوضح الطریق لاهل التحقیق و ایات صراطه الدقیق لاولی الفحص و التدقیق
